_meta.purpose: Hand-curated and LLM-extracted edges that supplement the regex auto-extractor.
_meta.schema: Same as data/topology.raw.json edges, but every entry has source='verified'.
merge_rules: If a verified edge (from, to, relation) exists, it overrides the auto edge.
If a verified edge (from, to) exists with a different relation, it replaces the auto relation.
Verified edges with confidence < 0.7 are rejected at merge time.
Edge IDs are regenerated on merge.
_meta.validate: node IDs must match data/topology.raw.json; merge script enforces this.
